---
# Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
# Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial
title: "Configure assessment options"
date: last-modified
---

{{< include _assessment-options.qmd >}}

::: {.callout title="By default, new validation report templates include four suggested default assessment options."}
You can add, edit, delete, and reorder these options, or remove them entirely to disable assessments.

:::

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to manage templates.

:::

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

1. Under Documents, select **Templates**.

1. Select the **Validation Report** tab.

1. Click the template you want to configure.

1. On the template details page, locate the **Assessment Options** section.

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Add an option

a. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Assessment Option**.

a. Provide the details for your assessment option:

   - **[name]{.smallcaps}** (required) -- A short label for the option, between 2 and 50 characters (for example, `Full adherence`).
   - **[description]{.smallcaps}** (optional) -- A longer explanation of what the option means.
   - **[color]{.smallcaps}** -- Select a color from the color palette to visually distinguish this option.

a. Click **Add Option**.

#### Edit an option

a. Click **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** on the assessment option you want to modify.

a. Select **{{< fa pencil >}} Edit Option**.

a. Update the name, description, or color as needed.

a. Click **Update Option**.

#### Delete an option

a. Click **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** on the assessment option you want to remove.

a. Select [**{{< fa trash-can >}} Delete Option**]{.red}.

a. Confirm the deletion.

::: {.callout-important title="Assessment options that are in use cannot be deleted."}
If an assessment option is currently assigned to sections in active validation reports, you must first reassign those sections to a different option before you can delete it.
:::

#### Reorder options

a. Click **{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}{{< fa ellipsis-vertical >}}** and hold firmly to drag assessment options into your preferred order.

a. After reordering, click **Save** to persist the new order.

#### Disable assessments

To disable assessments for a template, delete all assessment options. Validation reports using that template will no longer display the assessment dropdown or assessment summary.

:::

<!-- PLACEHOLDER: ![Configuring assessment options for a validation report template](configure-assessment-options.png){fig-alt="A screenshot showing the assessment options configuration on a validation report template details page" .screenshot} -->
